---
title: "Xinru Wang"
description: "Contributor to nycOpenData and NYC Open Data Week 2026"
---

## Project

- [Beating Around the Bush: Uncovering the Hidden Link Between Urban Trees and Wildlife Activity](../nyc-open-data-2026/08-Beating-Around-the-Bush--Uncovering-the-Hidden-Link-Between-Urban-Trees-and-Wildlife-Activity-Xinru.qmd)

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/xrwangxr)\
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/xinru-wang-798937393/)\
-   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0006-3833-8199)
